title: Carpet Cleaning
description:
This well-established full service carpet cleaning company with over 30 years of experience and a strong reputation for quality as well as a loyal customer base. Our services include carpet, tile & grout, air duct & dryer vent, upholstery cleaning.
This is a home-based company with limited overhead and no debt. The price includes 1 van with boxxer truck-mounted cleaning unit, dehumidifier, carpet fans, air duct cleaning equip., tile cleaning wand, plenty of high pressure and vacuum hoses. Also included is a thumb drive and hard copies of previous customers (10 years). Sale includes a C corporation registered in Texas (Silver steam ent. Inc. ) the owner of the carpet cleaning company.

Ad#:2330852
